svg.title: <size:18>Amazon Locker Service - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)</size>

g.text: Amazon Locker Service - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "Customer orders a package, carrier delivers to locker, customer gets OTP, picks up package."
is the central entity — has size,
a size, a state, and holds one package.
Key rule: locker size >= package size.
STEP 7 - Which locker gets the package?
-> customer enters OTP -> package retrieved, locker back to Available.
LockerLocation contains Lockers, each has size + state
Locker allocated by size-fit or nearest-available
